response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Highly accurate phonetic matches with the provided lyrics reference for 'Zankoku na Tenshi no Thesis'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the lyrics for the song segment while manually transcribing the extensive spoken dialogue by AZKi and the narrator, which were absent from the lyric text.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken dialogue precisely around rapid deliveries, split subtitles logic-by-logic for the song, and annotated the background chants at the end of the video segment.

subtitles.original: みんなこんあずきー！
subtitles.english: Hi, everyone! Kon'AZKi!

subtitles.original: 今日は、AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover
subtitles.english: Today is the AZKi 8th Birthday Live Crossover,

subtitles.original: 平成・令和 アニソン歌合戦へお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: thank you so much for coming to the Heisei vs. Reiwa Anime Song Battle!

subtitles.original: 今回は、平成赤チームと令和青チームの2チームに分かれて
subtitles.english: This time, we are divided into two teams: the Heisei Red Team and the Reiwa Blue Team...

subtitles.original: アニソンで歌合戦をやっていきます！
subtitles.english: ...and we'll be having a singing battle with anime songs!

subtitles.original: 今回ゲストのみんなも、それぞれのチームに分かれて参戦してくれます！
subtitles.english: All of our guests today will also split up into their respective teams to participate!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグは #AZKi生誕ライブ2026 こちらこちら！
subtitles.english: The hashtag is #AZKiSeitanLive2026! It's right here!

subtitles.original: で、ぜひですね
subtitles.english: And please...

subtitles.original: 赤チーム、ここが良かったよ！とか
subtitles.english: ...post things like, "The Red Team was great here!"...

subtitles.original: 青チーム、ここが美しかったよ！とかですね
subtitles.english: ...or "The Blue Team was so beautiful here!"

subtitles.original: たくさんポストお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please post a lot!

subtitles.original: そして、サムネイルにも書いてありますが
subtitles.english: Also, as written in the thumbnail...

subtitles.original: 新衣装のお披露目と！
subtitles.english: ...we will be revealing a new outfit...

subtitles.original: 重大告知もあるので
subtitles.english: ...and we also have a major announcement...

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててください！
subtitles.english: ...so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、みんな盛り上がる準備はいいかー！？
subtitles.english: With that said, is everyone ready to get hyped?!

subtitles.original: おお！
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: それでは、平成・令和 アニソン歌合戦、開幕です！
subtitles.english: Well then, let the Heisei vs. Reiwa Anime Song Battle begin!

subtitles.original: まずは平成赤チーム
subtitles.english: First up, Heisei Red Team!

subtitles.original: IRyS
subtitles.english: IRyS!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は
subtitles.english: The song is...

subtitles.original: アニメ『新世紀エヴァンゲリオン』より、すべての始まりとなる一曲
subtitles.english: ...the song that started it all, from the anime "Neon Genesis Evangelion"...

subtitles.original: 『残酷な天使のテーゼ』
subtitles.english: "A Cruel Angel's Thesis"!

subtitles.original: 続いて令和青チーム
subtitles.english: Next up, Reiwa Blue Team!

subtitles.original: 音乃瀬奏
subtitles.english: Kanade Otonose!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は
subtitles.english: The song is...

subtitles.original: 『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』より、すべてを終わりに導く曲
subtitles.english: ...the song that brings everything to an end, from "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time"...

subtitles.original: 『One Last Kiss』
subtitles.english: "One Last Kiss"!

subtitles.original: 時代を超えて交差する二つのメロディ、二曲続けてどうぞ！
subtitles.english: Two melodies crossing over time! Please listen to both songs back-to-back!

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のように
subtitles.english: Like a cruel angel,

subtitles.original: 少年よ神話になれ
subtitles.english: young boy, become a myth!

subtitles.original: 蒼い風がいま 胸のドアを叩いても
subtitles.english: Even if the blue wind now knocks on your heart's door,

subtitles.original: 私だけをただ見つめて 微笑んでるあなた
subtitles.english: You are just staring at me and smiling.

subtitles.original: そっとふれるもの もとめることに夢中で
subtitles.english: Absorbed in seeking what you gently touch,

subtitles.original: 運命さえまだ知らない いたいけな瞳
subtitles.english: You don't even know your fate yet, those innocent eyes.

subtitles.original: だけどいつか気付くでしょう その背中には
subtitles.english: But someday you'll notice that on your back,

subtitles.original: 遥か未来めざすための 羽根があること
subtitles.english: There are wings meant to aim for the distant future.

subtitles.original: 残酷な天使のテーゼ 窓辺からやがて飛び立つ
subtitles.english: A cruel angel's thesis, soon you will fly from the windowsill.

subtitles.original: ほとばしる熱いパトスで 思い出を裏切るなら
subtitles.english: If you betray your memories with overflowing, hot pathos,

subtitles.original: この宇宙を抱いて輝く 少年よ神話になれ
subtitles.english: Embrace this universe and shine, young boy, become a myth!

subtitles.english: Fariya

subtitles.english: Tuse

subtitles.english: Sesta

subtitles.english: Merna
